title: Immunostaining of Isolated Lymphoid Follicles in Small Intestine
author: Chise Suzuki
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.jr3cm8n

steps.instruction: Rince the intestine with cold PBS in petri dish
Divide a small intestine into four segments (A to D, proximal to distal).
Incubate tubes on shaker at 37℃ for 15 min (shaking 90 rmp) and then shake the tubes vigorously 20 times by hand.
Rince the segment with cold PBS and submerge the segment in 10% formalin-buffered saline and place at 4℃ at least 1h.
Wash the segment for 5 min with 50 mM Tris-HCl (pH 7.2) buffered saline (150 mM NaCl) (TBS) containing 0.5% Triton X-100 for 3 times.
Add 1% H 2 O 2 in methanol and shake 15 min at room temperature (rt).
Add 1 drop Avidin D solution (Avidin/Biotin Blocking Kit) in 250 μl PBS containing 1% BSA and incubate 30 min at rt. Then wash the segment with TBS.

Add 1 drop of biotin solution (Avidin/Biotin Blocking Kit) and 2.5 μl of primary antibody* in 250 μl TBST (* Rat anti-mouse CXCR5 (clone 2G8, BD Biosciences, San Diego, CA) and incubate overnight at 4℃. Wash the segments for 5 min with PBS 3 times.
Add 2 μl biotinylated anti-Ig secondary antibody（Anti-Rat Ig HRP detection kit, Pharmingen) in 400 μl antibody diluent and incubate for 30 min at rt. Wash for 2 min with PBS 3 times.
Add 350 μl Streptavidin-HRP and incubate for 30min at rt. Wash for 2 min with PBS 3 times.

Drain PBS. Add 300 μl 3,3'-diaminobenzidine tetrahydrochloride (DAB) solution (1 drop DAB/1ml DAB buffer). Incubate for 5 min or until the desired color intensity is reached. Wash for 2 min with PBS 3 times. Rince the segment with water for 2 min 3 times
Mount the stained segments of intestine on a slide glass and fixed with Mount-Quick Aqueous.
Place each segment into a 15 ml tube filled with 10 ml warmed (37℃) Hank’s balanced salt solution (HBSS) containing 5 mM EDTA at 37℃
Discard supernatant containing epithelium and filter remaning the intestinal segment through a gauze.
Put retained the intestinal segment in the 15 ml tube containing 10 ml HBSS containing 5 mM EDTA.
Wash for 5 min with TBS containing 0.05% Tween 20 (TBST) for 3 times.
